steps.title: Join contrasting clauses
steps.content: The sentence has two independent clauses: the drawing is less well known than van Gogh's paintings, and it is still considered important. The word "still" signals contrast, so the clauses need a comma plus a contrasting conjunction.

steps.title: Reject faulty boundaries
steps.content: Choice B creates a comma splice. Choice C fuses the clauses without punctuation or a conjunction. Choice D supplies the conjunction but omits the required comma before it. The answer is A.
